calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-25-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2022 Continued To Jan-24-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to January 24, 2023 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
